query: UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Brig. ', 'Brigadeiro ') WHERE address LIKE '%Brig. %';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Brig. ', 'Brigadeiro ') WHERE address LIKE '%Brig. %';
